daily.topThemeTitle: Write the Rules Before Buying the Tools
daily.topThemeBody: Florida State is using pilots plus faculty and student feedback to decide which AI vendors survive procurement, an Indigenous school built its AI framework from community input first, and the buy-side guidance keeps arriving ahead of the purchase orders.

themes.title: Write the Rules Before Buying the Tools
Who Gets In, and Who Gets Counted
Defending the Human Part of Learning

heroWeek.themeBody: Canvas paused data delivery over a potential security threat, while SonicWall found 61% of exploits land within 48 hours of proof-of-concept and 77% of organizations take over a week to patch.
